pages.text: The Distiller can purify and concentrate liquids. It can also be used for destructive distillation.

pages.title: Obtaining Nickel
pages.text: Nickel ore is a green ore block relatively common at around y=48 and raw nickel can be smelted.$(br)Alternatively, killing Drowned has a 1% chance of dropping a nickel ingot, which is 8% if a player gets credit for the kill.

pages.title: Using the Distiller
pages.text: Place a Distiller Base, Distiller Columns (filled or not with gravel) and a Distiller Top, in a column. Then place a liquid in the base and heat the distiller. The product can then be harvested from the top. However, this process is extremely slow.
Be patient... or build more distillers!
